body: The Jakarta Composite Stock Price Index (JCI) opened strong in the green zone at 7,770.18 but fell to 7,725.72 by 10:00 WIB, ultimately closing below the green zone. Other indices, including LQ45, IDX30, and IDXESG, also experienced contractions, with large market capitalization issuers such as Bank Rakyat Indonesia and Unilever Indonesia correcting, while others like Telkom Indonesia and Bank Negara Indonesia saw growth.
title: Jakarta Composite Stock Price Index Falls into Red Zone at Close Despite Early Gains

body: In August 2024, national tourist trips in Indonesia decreased by 29.38% to 648.11 thousand, with Malaysia being the top destination, accounting for 14.09% of foreign tourist visits. The total number of foreign tourist visits reached 1.39 million, with Australia and China being the second and third most visited countries, respectively, at 11.47% and 9.41% of total visits.
title: National Tourist Trips in Indonesia Decrease by 29.38% in August 2024 Due to Ongoing Pandemic

body: PT PP Presisi Tbk, a building construction issuer, has received an extension to sell its treasury shares until March 31, 2029, from the initial deadline of July 30, 2027, with 108.06 million shares to be sold, equivalent to 1.06% of its issued fully paid-up capital. The sale is expected to generate fresh funds of at least IDR 8.5 billion, based on the current share price of IDR 79 per share.
title: PT PP Presisi TBK receives extension to sell treasury shares until 2029.

body: PT United Tractors TBK has completed the acquisition of 257,449 shares of Supreme Energie Rantau Dedap, a geothermal power generation company, for $80.58 million or IDR 1.25 trillion, slightly lower than the initial agreement. The acquisition, carried out through its subsidiary PT Energia Prima Nusantara, is part of United Tractors' business diversification initiative and sustainable growth strategy in the field of geothermal electricity generation.
title: PT United Tractors completes acquisition of Supreme Energis Rantau Dedap geothermal power generation company for $80.58 million.
